data.title: Rayonier merges with PotlatchDeltic, creating a company with 4M+ acres of timberland and various operations in the US.
data.description: WILDLIGHT, Fla.--Rayonier disclosed the finalization of its merger with PotlatchDeltic Corporation. This merging results in a combined entity that possesses more than four million acres of varied timberland across the United States. Additionally, the company oversees six sawmills, one industrial-grade plywood mill, and activities in residential and commercial real estate developments, along with a rural land sales program. Mark McHugh, serving as President and Chief Executive Officer of Rayonier, expressed enthusiasm over the closure of this significant merger.

data.title: Inovalis REIT sells Trio property post preliminary exchange agreement signed on October 10, 2025, after reclassification in Q3.
data.description: In Toronto, Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: INO.UN) confirmed the completion of the sale of its Trio property through a preliminary exchange agreement signed on October 10, 2025, after the third quarter. Earlier classified as an asset held for sale on the REIT’s financial statements as of September 30, 2025, the disposition has now been finalized, and the REIT has received the proceeds.

data.title: West Hollywood's Cupid Lips Med Spa wins two Americas Property Awards for 2024-2025: Best Public Service Interior for California & Nation.
data.description: The renowned medical spa, Cupid Lips, located in West Hollywood and renowned for its expertise in lip enhancement and facial aesthetics, has received two esteemed Americas Property Awards for 2024-2025. The awards, recognizing the spa as the Best Public Service Interior in California and the whole nation, highlight its excellence in providing exceptional services.

data.title: Texas LNG assembles initial bank group for $5.7 billion debt financing package for 4 MTPA LNG export terminal in Texas, on track for FID in early 2026.
data.description: Houston-based Texas LNG Brownsville LLC, a subsidiary of Glenfarne Group, LLC, disclosed a notable advancement in securing a $5.7 billion debt financing plan for the construction of their four million tonnes per annum liquefied natural gas export terminal in the Port of Brownsville, Texas. The project is progressing as per the timeline, aiming for a Final Investment Decision (FID) by early 2026.

data.title: Midmark RTLS introduces BLE Sensory Network for efficient RTLS with near-room accuracy. VERSAILLES, Ohio, Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: Revolutionizing facility-wide RTLS coverage, the latest Plug-In BLE sensors offer near-room location accuracy at a quicker pace and lower cost. Based in VERSAILLES, Ohio, the launch took place on January 30, 2026. Midmark RTLS, a top RTLS technology provider specializing in optimizing clinical workflow, spearheaded this innovative solution.

data.title: Presidio and EQV Ventures announce SEC registration statement approved, shareholders meeting on Feb 27, 2026.
data.description: An upcoming Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders has been planned for February 27, 2026, to vote on the approval of a significant business combination. This meeting will involve shareholders considering and deciding on the proposed merger, acquisition, or partnership. It marks a crucial event for the company as it looks to potentially join forces with another entity. The meeting date marks a pivotal moment for shareholders to cast their votes and influence the future direction of the organization. Make sure to mark your calendar and participate in this essential decision-making process on February 27, 2026.

data.title: Enzon Pharmaceuticals begins exchange offer for its Series C Preferred Stock linked to Viskase merger.
data.description: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Cranford, New Jersey, revealed on Jan. 30, 2026, that it has initiated an exchange offer related to its Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock (Series C Preferred Stock) as part of a merger with Viskase Companies, Inc. The offer is available for holders of the Series C Preferred Stock, as outlined in the Prospectus/Consent Solicitation/Offer to Exchange. Enzon Pharmaceuticals trades on the OTCQB under the symbol ENZN.

data.title: Reflex Advanced finalizes private placement offering.
data.description: In the latest update, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million globally, with the death toll surpassing 300,000. The United States continues to be the most affected country, with over 1.5 million confirmed cases and more than 90,000 deaths. In Europe, Italy and Spain are among the hardest-hit countries, with over 200,000 cases each. Meanwhile, efforts to develop a vaccine are ongoing, with several clinical trials showing promising results. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to control the spread of the virus and support their economies during these challenging times.

data.title: Abacus Global Management to repurchase $20 million worth of shares, reflecting confidence in business model and earnings.
data.description: The Board of Directors has expressed strong confidence in the company’s long-term business model, recurring earnings, and capital strength, emphasizing their support for the direction of the company. This showcases a positive outlook on the company’s future prospects and stability. The endorsement from the Board underscores their belief in the company’s financial health and potential for sustained growth. This affirmation is significant as it highlights the support and trust of the Board in the company's strategies and financial performance, further solidifying investor confidence.

data.title: Elcora closes second tranche of private placement in Canada.
